title: Bare Bones X Waystones
description: Retextures the Waystones mod to match the Bare Bones Resource Pack
body:
# Simplify your waystones ## Retextures the Waystones mod to fit in with the Bare Bones resource pack. ![ A hallway with portstones and warp plates in the front, then waystones, then a sharestone in the back ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2581f201be86fb0addf9446a4a8c7048533d3ac1.png) ## Instructions Intended to be used with both the Bare Bones texture pack and the Waystones mod ## Links Support [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) by RobotPants!
Support [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) by BlayTheNinth!
